comment: Custom OTT-style multiband upward/downward compressor. This is not an Ableton or Airwindows port; it is a pedal-safe original design with Ableton-style macro controls.

params.name: DryWet
params.comment: Dry/wet blend for parallel OTT-style compression.

params.name: Time
params.comment: Envelope and gain smoothing time. Lower is faster and more aggressive.

params.name: Output
params.comment: Post-compressor output level. Center/default maps to unity gain.

params.name: SplitFrq
params.comment: Moves the low/high crossover pair together, similar to the split frequency controls on multiband dynamics.
